---
title: "EDA_Linear"
author: "Justin Yeo"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: pdf_document
---

```{R}

names = c("Year","Average","Lowest","Highest", "numberOfWeeks")

median = read_csv("cleaned_mortgage_rates_annual_avg.csv", col_names = names)
median = median %>% slice(5:nrow(median))

house = read_csv("CASTHPI_yearly_cleaned.csv")
house = house %>% select(-Year)

income = read_csv("cleaned_income_data.csv")
income = income %>% select(-Date)

combined = cbind(median, house, income)
combined <- combined %>% mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.))))

cor_mat <- cor(combined[, c("Average", "Yearly_Average_HPI", "Median_Household_Income")],
               use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
cor_mat
```
High interaction (-0.814) between the two variables (mortgage rate average and median household income)

```{R}
interactionModel = lm(combined$Yearly_Average_HPI ~ combined$Median_Household_Income + combined$Average + combined$Median_Household_Income:combined$Average)
summary(interactionModel)
plot(interactionModel)
```
